untranslatable_reason: This is a philosophy/framework statement about matching timeframe and strategy to personal constraints. It describes entry conditions and strategy parameters (max 2 trades/week, 20-day min holding, 15 min daily monitoring, complexity level 1), but contains NO explicit position sizing rule (no risk %, position %, Kelly, volatility scaling, or drawdown-based sizing method). The parameters are constraints/filters, not sizing mechanics.
